title: Reference Stylized 3D Floating Head Portrait AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Reference Stylized 3D Floating Head Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image premium stylized 3D floating-head portrait for provided reference portrait before premium stylized 3D floating-head transformation, preserving adult subject from the provided reference photo. Subject: adult subject from the provided reference photo keeps the exact face shape, bone structure, jawline, eyes, nose, mouth, skin tone, marks, expression, hairstyle, and same hair length, hair texture, glasses, hat, headphones, or other visible accessories if present from the reference photo while becoming a stylized 3D realistic floating head. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: Preserved reference stylized 3d floating head portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-detailed premium stylized 3D realism with natural non-plastic skin, visible pores, micro-texture, subtle subsurface scattering, volumetric realistic hair strands, and polished high-end render quality. Color Palette: Fixed cinematic purple ambient background, natural skin tones, soft facial highlights, realistic hair color from reference, and restrained rim-light separation. Lighting: Soft frontal key light, subtle rim light, gentle cheekbone and nose highlights, realistic under-chin shadow, and smooth light gradients. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
